steps.title: Find the main verb
steps.content: The subject is the researchers. The phrase finding that administrative unit GK13 had a 0.62 ratio interrupts the main clause. After that interruption, the sentence still needs a finite verb to say what the researchers did.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is a participle, Choice C is an infinitive, and Choice D is a perfect participle. None can serve as the main verb of the independent clause. The past-tense finite verb completes the sentence: the researchers recommended efforts to improve biodiversity. The answer is A.
